features: Dispatch maps now use road-route geometry instead of straight guard-to-property lines when route data is available
Dispatch assigned patrol routes fetch OSRM road geometry and cache it in browser session storage
Dispatch route fallback uses a bent route-style path instead of a straight line if the routing service is unavailable
Dispatch map metrics now show Route Distance and ETA
Pending Dispatch mini map now shows selected/nearest online guard to destination route preview
Pending Dispatch distance now reflects road-route distance/ETA when available
Guard selector options display distance and ETA from each online guard to the request property
Changing the selected guard recalculates and refreshes the mini route map and distance
